prayer.title: Hail Mary
prayer.text: Hail Mary, full of grace, the Lord is with thee. Blessed art thou among women, and blessed is the fruit of thy womb, Jesus. Holy Mary, Mother of God, pray for us sinners, now and at the hour of our death. Amen.

thought.headline: Small graces count.
thought.body: A good nurse, a warm blanket, a phone call, a moment without pain — each can become a little candle. Notice one mercy today and let it be enough.
thought.verse: His mercies are renewed each morning. — Lamentations 3:23

blessing: May Our Lady wrap you in her mantle and bring comfort to your heart.
practice: Make today’s waiting a prayer: ‘Jesus, I trust in You.’

daily_readings.label: USCCB Daily Mass Readings
daily_readings.note: Read or listen to today’s Catholic Mass readings from the United States Conference of Catholic Bishops.
